function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to Claudia Reiter (INV-0006, issued 2025-12-11).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checks pass (single attachment path was read, ordering trivially valid, recipient matches canonical miles record, quoted subject safe). Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Successfully wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task complete: oldest inbox processed, all 6 related finance files read per preflight completeness, outbound draft created, inbox removed.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing processing.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a reply draft with the single oldest Claudia-linked invoice attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS for inbox/entities/finance/outbox lanes, read required workflows for inbox processing and sending email, processed all preflight-listed related finance files, deleted inbox only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested replying with the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter. Sender identity matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Preflight listed 6 related finance files; all six were read and oldest determined as INV-0006 (issued 2025-12-11). Created outbound email draft in 60_outbox/outbox with that single attachment and then deleted the processed inbox item per inbox/workflow rules.
